message:
fix(text): preserve indentation whitespace on word wrap when preserve_indent is enabled

Fixes whitespace-only word handling during line wrapping: previously,
whitespace-only words that triggered a wrap were always discarded.
Now they are only discarded when preserve_indent is false; when true,
the whitespace is retained as indentation for the next line.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
